questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Ranking Functions?
options: Inefficient scaling of ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), DENSE_RANK() duplicates handling differences.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), DENSE_RANK() duplicates handling differences.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), DENSE_RANK() duplicates handling differences scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
